title: Faithful Programmer
description:
NOTE: Use Programmer Art (Built-in) and put this pack above it.

This pack aims to change all modern textures to be more faithful to the old textures of the game (pre 1.12), such as deepslate items nether biomes ores and more.
body:
![TitleImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/X612RygT/images/53a90c7a6214f66d834799cea2d996910da0ae25.png)

Faithful Programmer

This pack aims to change all modern textures to be more faithful to the old textures of the game (pre 1.12).

Please make sure to have ProgrammerArt(built-in) enabled and load this pack above it as shown in my gallary.
